# archforge

> The preflight linter for AI-generated PowerPoint (.pptx). It reads the built file
> (XML, font-resolution chain, geometry, image alpha; no PowerPoint needed) and blocks
> silent font fallback (deep CJK coverage), unreadable sizes, colliding frames,
> off-canvas text, and AI-tell punctuation before a human sees a render.

Quick use for agents: `pip install archforge`, then `archforge deck.pptx --profile full --json`.
Ship condition: `summary.error_count == 0` AND `summary.incomplete == false`. Findings carry a
`location` payload (shape id, absolute bbox in inches, paragraph/run, table cell, `related`
counterpart) so you can fix the exact shape without text search. Rule codes (E1..E4, W1..W18)
are stable language-independent identifiers; message language follows `--lang` (en/ko).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/blob/main/README.md): overview, 30-second quickstart, CI (GitHub Action, pre-commit), JSON contract
- [Agent skill pack (SKILL.md)](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/blob/main/skills/archforge-pptx-lint/SKILL.md): the build-lint-fix loop, per-code fix guide, output contract; also bundled in the wheel (`archforge skill --install`)
- [Calibration record](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/blob/main/docs/CALIBRATION.md): the measured PowerPoint font-resolution model (COM render probes) and every threshold's rationale
- [Examples](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/tree/main/examples): defect decks with expected outputs (`archforge demo` regenerates them anywhere)
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Contributing

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): gates change only with render evidence
- [Report a false positive](https://github.com/Love-Ash/archforge/issues/new/choose): the most valuable report; confirmed FPs become permanent regression fixtures
